steps.title: Connect the two texts
steps.content: Text 1 says mycoprotein has a lower environmental impact than beef but remains too expensive for broad access. It also says biochemists are looking for cheaper substrates to reduce production costs. Text 2 says replacing some beef consumption with mycoprotein could greatly reduce deforestation over thirty years. Without cost reductions, that substitution would be harder to achieve at global scale.

steps.title: Use cost to explain impact
steps.content: The author of Text 1 would likely see cheaper production as a way to make the deforestation benefit in Text 2 more achievable. Choice A shifts to chicken, pork, and water use; Choice C invents consumer preference; and Choice D adds unsupported country-level claims. The answer is B.
